　　　　　  马尔科姆·辛克莱 Malcolm Sinclair
　　　　　  Tommy O'Neill Tommy O'Neill


◎简　　介  

　　A BELFAST STORY explores life after terrorism. Set in a city which has weathered hundreds of years of hatred, 30 years of bombs, and a war without winners, just victims. A new era brings new risks. There is peace, but that can also be deadly.Colm Meaney stars as a man weary of doing right. Times are changing, car bombs are less common and terrorists find themselves out of work...
